creator: eriam@mediavirtuel.com
text:
Hello

I gzipped the path file so I can upload it.

This is an attempt for a port of the Infobright database server.

This is my first port.I've used portlint and it seems fines.

Also due to weirdness I neede to specify automake and autotools on make_depends rather then with USE_AUTOTOOLS.

It compiles fine and works like a charm on 8.1.

Thanks

Eriam
